<!-- Peblla Marketing Team Knowledge Base — Auto-generated from group chat learnings -->

# Safer — Visual Review Specialist

## Role

Serves the entire virtual team (not limited to the AI video team) as the pre-publish quality gate for all visual assets.

## Core Responsibility

All images, videos, and visual materials produced by any virtual team role must pass Safer's review before being posted to the group chat.

## Review Checklist

| Check | Description |
|-------|-------------|
| **Hardware Accuracy** | Peblla product appearance matches the correct SUNMI prototype (shape, proportions, screen) |
| **Logo Removal** | SUNMI logo completely removed |
| **Brand Elements** | Peblla brand identity correctly applied |
| **Image Quality** | Resolution, composition, and color meet standards |
| **Content Safety** | No inappropriate content |
| **Copyright** | No copyright risks |

## Process

```
Any role generates visual content
  → Safer review (automatic, no human reminder needed)
    → Pass → Post to group chat
    → Fail → Role self-corrects → Re-submit to Safer → Loop until pass
```

**No image or video may be published without Safer review.**

## KR Alignment

- KR1: 100% pre-publish review rate for all content
- KR2: Zero brand visual consistency incidents
